control_objective: Ensure every AI use case is inventoried, risk-ranked, owned, and approved before development or deployment.
control_description: Mandatory intake form, ownership assignment, preliminary risk tiering, and approval routing.
evidence_required: Completed intake record and approval decision
testing_frequency: Per use case and annual refresh
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Govern; ISO/IEC 42001 Planning

control_objective: Confirm that data is complete, accurate, representative, traceable, and fit for intended AI use.
control_description: Data profiling, lineage review, missingness checks, outlier analysis, and data quality issue logging.
evidence_required: Data quality report and issue resolution evidence
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Map; ISO/IEC 23894 Risk Identification

control_objective: Assess privacy, consent, data minimization, purpose limitation, retention, and disclosure risks.
control_description: Privacy checklist and impact assessment for use cases involving personal information.
evidence_required: Privacy checklist or privacy impact assessment

control_objective: Validate secure architecture, access control, encryption, logging, vulnerability management, and threat model coverage.
control_description: Security-by-design review for AI systems, integrations, APIs, and vendor connections.
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Govern; ISO/IEC 42001 Operation

control_objective: Assess third-party AI governance, data handling, explainability, contractual protections, and audit rights.
control_description: Vendor questionnaire, model transparency review, data residency confirmation, and contractual control mapping.
evidence_required: Vendor review record and contract control evidence
mapped_framework: ISO/IEC 42001 Supplier Management; ISO/IEC 23894 Risk Treatment

control_objective: Identify and mitigate potential unfair outcomes or disparate impact.
control_description: Fairness metric selection, protected/proxy variable review, segmented testing, and mitigation plan.
evidence_required: Fairness test results and mitigation sign-off
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Measure; ISO/IEC 23894 Risk Analysis

control_objective: Document model purpose, drivers, limitations, interpretability approach, and user-facing explanation requirements.
control_description: Model card or system card with intended use, limitations, feature drivers, and explanation design.
evidence_required: Approved model card or system card
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Map and Measure; ISO/IEC 42001 Documentation

control_objective: Ensure high-risk outputs are reviewed, overridden, or escalated by accountable humans.
control_description: Defined review thresholds, escalation paths, override procedures, and decision logging.
evidence_required: Oversight SOP and sample decision logs
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Manage; ISO/IEC 23894 Risk Treatment

control_objective: Detect performance degradation, exception trends, and control failures after deployment.
control_description: Ongoing review of model metrics, false positive/negative rates, exceptions, and complaints.
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Measure and Manage

control_objective: Identify changes in data distribution, population, behavior, or model output patterns.
control_description: Population stability, feature drift, prediction drift, and alert thresholds.
testing_frequency: Monthly or real-time for high-risk systems
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Measure; ISO/IEC 23894 Monitoring

control_objective: Validate that GenAI outputs follow policy, remain grounded, and avoid unsafe guidance.
control_description: Red-team testing, refusal behavior testing, grounding checks, and unsafe content evaluation.
evidence_required: Guardrail test results and defect log
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Measure and Manage; ISO/IEC 42001 Operation

control_objective: Assess whether malicious or manipulative prompts can bypass system instructions or access restricted data.
control_description: Prompt injection test suite covering direct, indirect, jailbreak, and tool manipulation patterns.
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Measure; Security controls

control_objective: Maintain traceable records of AI inputs, outputs, decisions, overrides, approvals, and exceptions.
control_description: Logging standard covering system events, human decisions, escalations, and evidence retention.
evidence_required: Audit log sample and retention configuration

control_objective: Ensure residual risks are explicitly accepted, mitigated, transferred, or escalated by accountable owners.
control_description: Risk decision workflow, approval authority, risk acceptance memo, and expiry date.
evidence_required: Risk acceptance memo or committee decision
testing_frequency: Per material risk and annual refresh
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Govern and Manage; ISO/IEC 23894 Risk Treatment

control_objective: Ensure AI issues are logged, assigned, remediated, escalated, and closed with evidence.
control_description: Severity matrix, SLA, escalation trigger, owner assignment, and closure evidence requirement.
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Manage; ISO/IEC 42001 Improvement

control_objective: Restrict agentic AI systems to approved tools, approved data, and approved action boundaries.
control_description: Least-privilege tool access, transaction limits, confirmation requirements, and blocked action categories.
evidence_required: Tool permission matrix and test evidence
mapped_framework: NIST AI RMF Manage; ISO/IEC 42001 Operation
